title: State Street: A Safe Anchor To Hold Onto As Dividend Growth & Capital Strength Sails Strong (Downgrade)
text: State Street is downgraded to Hold from a previous Strong Buy. The hold opportunity comes from dividend growth and stability, capital strength, and improving equity markets which drive fees higher. It shows strength in AUM/AUC net inflows.

title: BlackRock, State Street subpoenaed in House's ESG investigation
text: The House Judiciary Committee, chaired by Rep. Jim Jordan, on Friday subpoenaed BlackRock and State Street Global Advisors for documents and communications related to the panel's probe into environmental, social and governance, or ESG, goals and antitrust laws.

title: State Street Corporation (NYSE: STT) Declares Fourth Quarter Dividend on its Common Stock
text: BOSTON--(BUSINESS WIRE)--State Street Corporation (NYSE: STT) today announced a quarterly cash dividend of $0.69 per share of common stock, payable on January 12, 2024 to common shareholders of record at the close of business on January 2, 2024. About State Street Corporation State Street Corporation (NYSE: STT) is one of the world's leading providers of financial services to institutional investors including investment servicing, investment management and investment research and trading. title: State Street (STT) to Cut Jobs, Incur Repositioning Charge in Q4
text: As part of its multiyear business streamlining initiative, State Street (STT) is cutting around 1,500 jobs. Hence, the company is expected to incur $175-$200 million as repositioning charge in Q4.

title: House panel subpoenas Vanguard, says it ‘colluded' with rivals to decarbonize U.S. economy
text: The House Judiciary Committee issued subpoenas Monday to Vanguard Group and Arjuna Capital for documents and communications related to its investigation into possible illegal collusion to deprive funding to fossil fuel companies.

title: 2023 Layoff Tracker: State Street Cuts Hundreds Of Employees
text: Financial services giant State Street Corp. reportedly plans to cut roughly 1,500 jobs, making it the latest major U.S. company to reduce its head count this year (see Forbes' layoff tracker from the first quarter here).

title: Down 6% Since The Beginning Of 2023, What Should You Expect From State Street Stock?
text: State Street's stock (NYSE: STT) has lost 6% YTD, as compared to the 19% rise in the S&P500 over the same period. Further, the stock is currently trading at $73 per share, which is 3% below its fair value of $76 – Trefis' estimate for State Street's valuation.

title: Who Actually Owns America's Biggest Oil Company?
text: The list of owners of ExxonMobil is long. All the top owners are companies, and it could be argued that the people who invest in these companies that own Exxon stock are the actual owners.

title: State Street Corporation (NYSE: STT) Announces Date for Release of Fourth-Quarter and Full-Year 2023 Financial Results and Conference Call Webcast
text: BOSTON--(BUSINESS WIRE)--State Street Corporation (NYSE: STT) plans to announce its fourth-quarter and full-year 2023 financial results on Friday, January 19, 2024 at approximately 7:30 a.m. ET. The results will be reviewed via webcast and teleconference at 11:00 a.m. ET. The conference call will be accessible via audio webcast on State Street's Investor Relations website, http://investors.statestreet.com, and by telephone at (+1) 888-886-7786 (Conference ID: 39118546). Materials will be availa.

title: Mortgages and small loans will be more expensive under proposed regulations, bank chiefs say
text: The chief executives of big U.S. banks are arguing that banking regulations aimed at strengthening the country's financial system will instead hurt the economy.

title: State Street (STT) to Take Full Ownership of Another India JV
text: State Street (STT) finalizes the plan to take full ownership of JV with HCLTech.

title: State Street Announces Successful Implementation of State Street Alpha® for BMO Global Asset Management
text: BOSTON & TORONTO--(BUSINESS WIRE)--State Street Corporation (NYSE: STT) today announced a successful implementation of State Street Alpha, its front-to-back asset servicing platform for institutional investment and wealth managers, with BMO Global Asset Management (BMO GAM). BMO GAM is a leading Canadian asset manager with an innovative suite of mutual funds, ETFs, alternative funds, and other investment products. BMO GAM began the implementation of State Street's Alpha platform just under two.

title: State Street Global Advisors' 2024 Global Market Outlook: uncertainty to persist with bonds taking center stage
text: BOSTON--(BUSINESS WIRE)--State Street Global Advisors, the asset management business of State Street Corporation (NYSE: STT), today launched its 2024 Global Market Outlook: Positioning the Pieces outlining a mixed outlook and key investment themes for the year ahead. Following a year of market-moving surprises in 2023, including persistent inflation, muted growth, an abrupt banking crisis, and continued monetary policy tightening, State Street Global Advisors anticipates this uncertainty will r.

title: State Street taking full ownership of India joint venture with HCLTech
text: State Street Corp. STT, +1.51% said Monday it will take full ownership of a joint venture in India called Statestreet HCL Services. Financial terms were not disclosed.

title: State Street to Further Consolidate Operating Model in India
text: BOSTON--(BUSINESS WIRE)--State Street Corporation (NYSE: STT) and HCLTech announced today they are finalizing plans for State Street to assume full ownership of the Joint Venture operations (JV) Statestreet HCL Services, formed in 2012 to provide business operations services. This consolidation, which is based on the arrangements aligned with the existing JV agreement and expected to be completed in the second calendar quarter of 2024, will further streamline State Street's operating model in I.
